## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Related issue

Closes #(issue number), if applicable.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m compileall graphmind` passes
- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/ -v` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for new behavior
- [ ] Updated relevant docs (README / `docs/`) and `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or tenant-specific data committed

Anything reviewers should pay particular attention to.
